title: 12Pcs Spare Silicone Sealant Nozzles, Silicone Tube Nozzle Sealant Caulk Caps Resealable Silicone Cartridge Nozzles with 12Pcs Red Nozzle Caps for Bathroom Kitchen Finishing Sealing
features: 【12Pcs Silicone Nozzles with 12 Caps】12 Spare Sealant Nozzles with Thread and 12 red Caps, 4pcs silicone tools. The silicone sealant nozzles are about 10.5cm/4.13in long and the caps are 4.5cm/1.77in long, enough to meet your daily needs

【Durable Material】: Silicone nozzles are made of high-quality PE material, with exquisite workmanship, smooth surface, smooth edges without burrs, safe and stable to use, reusable, and long-lasting durability. Suitable for silicone caulking tubes, and used as door and window installation tools

【Caulking Gun Accessory】: Silicone sealant nozzles is the perfect caulking gun accessory for cartridge guns and silicone presses, suitable for all types of adhesive cartridges. silicone tube nozzles' outlet width is 3mm/0.11in, (can also be cut to size) for easy and even dispensing of adhesive and to ensure a beautiful repair

【Thread Seal Design】: The top thread of the caulking nozzle perfectly matches the red cap threads to form a seal; the tip will not harden after use and can be reused for sealant cartridges, gaskets, glue, etc. Bottom thread installation is easy to tighten, strong bite, not easy to fall off, perfectly fixed

【Wide Application】: The silicone caulking nozzles can easily help you repair the edges, corners, and seams of walls, and can be used for installation, sealing, DIY, bonding, and seam repair work during the decoration process of toilets, bathrooms, kitchens, living rooms and other areas
description: Features: Material: Good quality plastic. Color: White, Red, Black and Orange Weight: 110g (23.5cm*18.5cm*2.3cm) Package includes: 12 Pcs silicone tube nozzles with caps, 3 pcs orange silicone sealant finishing tools and 1 pcs black sealant removal tool. Note: If you are not satisfied for any reason, please contact us, we will try our best to solve the problem for you.
